clusters.justification: This cluster captures the broad functional axis of emotional reactivity, physiological arousal, and valence processing typically co-activating within limbic and salience subnetworks.
This cluster reflects the macroscopic domain of subjective value calculation, incentive motivation, and reinforcement-based decision making subserved by mesolimbic and frontostriatal circuitry.

This cluster encapsulates internally directed representational processes regarding the self and others, which characteristically map onto the large-scale co-activation patterns of the default mode network.
